title: Remote Web Designer Jobs in Canada | Montreal Jobs
description: Find the latest remote web designer jobs in Canada. Discover positions focusing on Webflow, Squarespace.

mainEntity.name: What is the average salary for a remote web designer in Canada?

acceptedAnswer.text: In Canada, a remote web designer's salary typically ranges from $60,000 to $95,000 CAD per year, depending on experience, specialization (like Webflow or custom React/Vue design), and the specific employer.

mainEntity.name: Do I need to know how to code to be a web designer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Not necessarily. Many roles focus strictly on visual design (UI/UX) using tools like Figma or Adobe XD. However, 'no-code' platforms like Webflow and Squarespace are increasingly popular, and understanding basic HTML/CSS is highly beneficial.

mainEntity.name: Are Canadian companies hiring for remote design roles?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, many Canadian tech companies and agencies, such as Shopify, Unbounce, Wealthsimple, and Jobber, frequently hire for remote or hybrid design positions across the country.

mainEntity.name: What portfolio platform is best for web designers?

acceptedAnswer.text: Building a custom portfolio on Webflow or Framer is highly recommended for web designers as it showcases your technical skills alongside your visual design capabilities. Traditional platforms like Behance or Dribbble are also good for individual case studies.
